title: NaviWell Group
html:
NaviWell Group — Austin-based wellness clinic where Yahir works as Health Coach starting Aug 2025. Yahir's primary bridge income in the Austin era — replaces the originally-planned Planet Fitness overnight shifts from the move-prep era.

What we know

  • Role: Health Coach (per the Oct 2025 resume).
  • Start date: August 2025 (start month per resume; SOP doc dated 2025-09-08).
  • Workflow uses ECW (eClinicalWorks) — patient charting platform.
  • Insurance billing: CPT code 99404 (preventive medicine counseling, individual, 60 min) + Assessment code Z71.82 (lifestyle counseling).
  • Patient activities tracked: resting HR + BP every session, weight + body fat percentage monthly, NaviWell Quiz at every session, educational material every chart, push toward diets-and-recipes tab.
  • Treatment template: "Trainer" template within ECW Progress Notes.
  • Real patients named in Yahir's SOP (privacy-flagged): Anontion Acosta (VRML training), Jorge Amaya.
  • Why this job: confirms Yahir's ISSA CPT certification is operational, gives him insurance-billable hours, fits the "part time personal training job to cover bills, but I want to build I want to work for myself" plan from the May 2025 move plan.

Open questions

  • Still active at vault creation (April 2026)?
  • Does Yahir's CS background ever surface in the role (e.g., dashboarding patient progress)?
  • Insurance reimbursements — is this a profitable model for NaviWell?
